Container.Name: houndarr
Container.Overview: Houndarr is a self-hosted companion for Radarr, Sonarr, Lidarr, Readarr, and Whisparr that automatically searches for missing, cutoff-unmet, and upgrade-eligible media in small, rate-limited batches. It sends search commands to your *arr instances on a schedule so you do not have to manually trigger broad searches and risk flooding your indexers.[br][br]Houndarr does not download anything, manage indexers, or touch your files. It is a focused search scheduler.[br][br][b]Features:[/b][br]- Independent missing and cutoff-unmet search passes per instance[br]- Optional upgrade pass to re-search items that already meet cutoff[br]- Configurable batch size, sleep interval, hourly cap, and per-item cooldown[br]- Queue backpressure (skips cycles when download queue is full)[br]- Built-in and proxy auth modes with trusted-proxy support[br]- API keys encrypted at rest[br]- Zero telemetry; only connects to your own *arr instances

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Houndarr web interface.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database and master key. Back this up.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file ownership inside the container.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file ownership inside the container.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true when running behind a reverse proxy with HTTPS termination.

Config.Name: Trusted Proxies
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of trusted reverse-proxy IPs or CIDR subnets for X-Forwarded-For (e.g. 172.18.0.0/16). Required for accurate rate limiting behind a proxy.

Config.Name: Auth Mode
Config.Description: Authentication mode: builtin (default) or proxy (delegate auth to reverse proxy/SSO).

Config.Name: Auth Proxy Header
Config.Description: Username header from reverse proxy in proxy mode (for example Remote-User). Required when Auth Mode is proxy.
